name: @electron-memory/monitor
description: Electron memory profiling SDK - zero-intrusion memory monitoring, anomaly detection, and regression analysis

scripts.build: tsup && vite build && npm run build:native:electron && npm run build:native:copy
scripts.build:native: cd native && npm install --ignore-scripts && npx node-gyp rebuild
scripts.build:native:electron: cd native && npm install --ignore-scripts && npx node-gyp rebuild --target=33.2.1 --arch=x64 --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers
scripts.build:native:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('native','build','Release','memory_native.node');const dir=p.join('dist','native');if(fs.existsSync(dir)||fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}),fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,p.join(dir,'memory_native.node'));console.log('Copied memory_native.node to dist/native/')}else{console.warn('WARNING: memory_native.node not found, native module will not be available')}"
scripts.build:skip-native: tsup && vite build && npm run build:native:copy
scripts.rebuild:native: cd native && npm install --ignore-scripts && npx node-gyp rebuild --target=33.2.1 --arch=x64 --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers

author: spcBackToLife
